programs.title: This Farming Life
programs.desc: Andrew and Gayle's baby boy arrives amidst the busy summer season, the dairy shed build takes its toll on Adam's leg, and Ally and his crofting pals shear sheep on a remote island.

programs.title: Best of Seven Worlds, One Planet
programs.desc: A compilation of the most spectacular moments from the series, highlighting the rich and wonderful diversity of life found on our planet's seven unique continents.

programs.title: Princes in the Tower: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programs.desc: What really happened to the princes in the tower.

programs.title: Live at the Apollo
programs.desc: The inimitable Tom Allen introduces the fantastic Rosie Jones and the wonderful Kae Kurd. Contains some strong language and adult humour.

programs.title: Newsnight, followed by Weather
programs.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day. Followed by Weather.

programs.title: Surgeons: At the Edge of Life
programs.desc: Rare penis cancer and severe endometriosis require radical procedures. Contains scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.
